original_image_tags: A rubber stamp mark with the word "SECRET" crossed out by a single line.

elements.description: Typed military document dated 8 January 1949 regarding a 'Sighting of "Flying Disc"'. It contains typed text, stamps labeled 'SECRET' at the top and bottom, and a handwritten annotation 'Inel' at the bottom left. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other visual elements are present.

judge.reason: Description A identifies a visual element (a rubber stamp mark) that Description B explicitly denies exists, stating 'No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other visual elements are present.'
